name: Warm Light Starter
copyPrompt: Build a bright, warm landing page for beginner OpenClaw users. Keep language simple, use 3-step onboarding cards, and add one-click copy prompts.

name: Minimal Pro AI
copyPrompt: Build a minimal AI product page with clear section rhythm, concise text blocks, and strong CTA for getting started.

name: Dark Tech Builder
copyPrompt: Build a dark, futuristic OpenClaw page for advanced users, with architecture cards, verification flow, and governance checklist.
